x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Authoritative source coverage confirms that CI data originates from trusted automated discovery. Now Assist gives higher confidence to discovery-sourced CIs when generating AI recommendations.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Replace manually-sourced CIs with discovery-sourced records by expanding ServiceNow Discovery, SCCM integration, or ServiceGraph Connectors. Target: 90%+ of active CIs with an authoritative discovery source.
